signal.description: diapr.ai continuous session marked failed while active run continues after ghost auto-retry

evidence.value: Run run_954fc3dc8164adc2 is state.status=active, phase=implementation, active turn turn_e8980b447123e0dc assigned to eng_director. Earlier turn turn_ff9ac2d212647f55 hit stdout_attach_failed at 2026-05-02T04:19:45Z and was auto retried to turn_e8980b447123e0dc at 2026-05-02T04:19:46Z. agentxchain status later shows the run active and the turn re-dispatched at 2026-05-02T04:23:05Z with worker_pid 60260, but continuous_session.status=failed and continuity still says restart_recommended=true with checkpoint run_status=blocked. This is inconsistent and may stop the full-auto loop even though the governed run is still active. Workaround: leave governed run active and let heartbeat monitor/recover using documented commands if it becomes blocked/stale.
